verify.value: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads are visible and labeled.
verify.rule: [datum_visibility] good: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads are visible and labeled. | bad: Interfaces exist only as abstract neighbor references.

verify.value: Critical slip, snap, pin, hinge, and slide interfaces state plausible clearances.
verify.rule: [clearance_named] good: Critical slip, snap, pin, hinge, and slide interfaces state plausible clearances. | bad: Moving/removable joints have no clearance or fit language.

verify.value: Each subsystem has at least three adjacent interfaces or datums.
verify.rule: [interface_count] good: Each subsystem has at least three adjacent interfaces or datums. | bad: Subsystem is isolated and does not show assembly neighbors.

verify.value: Fits are named with standard intent: clearance fit for sliding, transition for locating, interference/press only where justified, with a numeric allowance.
verify.rule: [standard_fit_vocabulary] good: Fits are named with standard intent: clearance fit for sliding, transition for locating, interference/press only where justified, with a numeric allowance. | bad: All mating diameters are modeled line-to-line with identical nominal dimensions and no fit class or allowance.

verify.value: Holes, slots, and pockets match real catalog hardware sizes (M3/M4 clearance holes, standard bearing OD, common pin diameters).
verify.rule: [standard_hardware_dimensioning] good: Holes, slots, and pockets match real catalog hardware sizes (M3/M4 clearance holes, standard bearing OD, common pin diameters). | bad: Hardware features use arbitrary dimensions that match no purchasable fastener, bearing, or pin.

verify.value: Tank, interstage, avionics, recovery, and engine-display modules are labeled educational/display-only.
verify.rule: [display_only_flowpath] good: Tank, interstage, avionics, recovery, and engine-display modules are labeled educational/display-only. | bad: Output drifts into actionable propulsion, ignition, or flight-performance instructions.

verify.value: Cutaway shows tank dummies, interstage datum, avionics bay, recovery bay, and removable engine display cartridge.
verify.rule: [cutaway_internal_readability] good: Cutaway shows tank dummies, interstage datum, avionics bay, recovery bay, and removable engine display cartridge. | bad: Vehicle is a smooth cylinder with no internal evidence.

verify.value: Risk/verification focuses on mockup structure, inspection, interfaces, and unsafe overclaiming.
verify.rule: [safe_risk_language] good: Risk/verification focuses on mockup structure, inspection, interfaces, and unsafe overclaiming. | bad: Risk/verification implies real launch readiness or manufacturing assurance.

verify.value: Interstage and module joints show locating datums, bolt-circle dummies, and alignment keys so the mock stack assembles repeatably for review.
verify.rule: [stage_interface_datum_evidence] good: Interstage and module joints show locating datums, bolt-circle dummies, and alignment keys so the mock stack assembles repeatably for review. | bad: Stages stack as butted cylinders with no locating feature, making the mock unassemblable and uninspectable.

verify.value: cad_brief.mass_est_g is a numeric grams value.
verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value, and verify must include a mass/budget check.

risk.desc: Tank dummy material selection may not withstand temperature extremes during display in varying environments.
risk.mit: Use of thermally stable materials like Al 7075 or CFRP with appropriate coatings.

risk.desc: Fastener torque specifications may need adjustment based on material properties and joint design.
risk.mit: Conduct torque testing and analysis during prototype assembly.

risk.desc: Alignment key placement could interfere with adjacent subsystem interfaces.
risk.mit: Review interface geometry and adjust alignment key location if necessary.
